text:
The Buor Family (, Buōru Ikka) is a minor Mafia family from the Kakin Empire. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 371 

Overview

The Bour Family is a minor Mafioso group and is like a political fringe candidate in the scramble to secure land in the New Continent. Three of the family members are stationed in front of the cafeteria door on the Tier 5 where they charged a 5,000 entrance toll. They also offered a loyalty card or a payment schedule for those interested, though it is unknown if either deal costs extra money or has any stipulations attached. The Bour Family also sold instant food. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Three thugs associated with the Buor Family set up a blockade on the path to the cafeteria in the Black Whale, demanding that anyone who wishes to pass pay them. They also bribed the soldiers on the ship to prevent them from interfering. 

After the three thugs are beaten by Phinks, Nobunaga, Feitan, and Franklin. The Bour Family explains to the Phantom Troupe members about the three great Mafia families of Kakin (Xi-Yu, Heil-Ly, and Cha-R) and how to reach the upper levels to reach the heads of the three families. Phinks also commands them to note down the room number of anyone taller than 190 cm (6′2″). However, no one of that height is on Tier 5. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 377
